Carlos Daniel Reséndiz Flores

Bio

I am interested in gene regulation, lncRNAs, autoimmune disease, evolution and bioinformatics.

Founding member of VieRnes de Bioinformatica en el LIIGH (bioinformatics fridays at @LIIGH-UNAM) | web page: https://viernesbioinformatica.github.io/ | Github: ViernesBioinfo2023_parte0; ViernesBioinfo2024_parte1; ViernesBioinfo2024_parte2; ViernesBioinfo2025_parte4; ViernesBioinfo2025_parte3; ViernesBioinfo2026_parte5

Education

Postdoctoral Fellowship | @LIIGH-UNAM | February 2023 - May 2026

PhD in Plant Biotechnology | @Cinvestav UGA-Langebio, Mexico | August 2018 - January 2023

Experience

Member of the @R-ladies Morelia, @RIABIO, @CDSB Mexico and @ISCB RSG-Mexico.

Repository Contributions

Webpage Plants&Python | Github Plants&Python | Dr. Daniel H. Chitwood, Dr. Robert VanBuren and Alejandra Rougon-Cardoso

Transcriptome-guided annotation and functional classification of long non-coding RNAs in Arabidopsis thaliana | Github Transcriptome-guided_lncRNA_annotation | Dr. @Selene Fernandez-Valverde
